gt_sql: SELECT teamDetails.team_long_name FROM Match AS matchData INNER JOIN Team AS teamDetails ON matchData.home_team_api_id = teamDetails.team_api_id WHERE matchData.season = '2015/2016' AND matchData.home_team_goal - matchData.away_team_goal < 0 GROUP BY matchData.home_team_api_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT t.team_long_name
FROM Match m
JOIN Team t ON m.home_team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE m.season = '2015/2016'
  AND m.home_team_goal < m.away_team_goal
GROUP BY t.team_api_id, t.team_long_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
LIMIT 1;
question: Which home team had lost the fewest matches in the 2016 season?
